name: repost-with-agent
description: Skill-only agent/OpenClaw-compatible plugin for browser-based reposting across LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, and Facebook. The running agent uses its existing tools (Read, Edit, Write, Bash, current-harness browser automation, and the current harness's Telegram/message tool — OpenClaw message tool or Claude Code plugin:telegram:telegram) to scrape, dedupe (Layer 1 strings + Layer 2 agent semantic check), post, log history, and Telegram-confirm. Maintains per-pair learnings.md so the agent does not re-figure platform quirks every scheduled tick. No CLI, no MCP server, no platform SDKs.
